title: Civil and Building Equipments
description:
Civil and Building Equipments
                                        Eristic (T) Investment Ltd in collaboration with Global leading Manufacturers supply various Civil and Buildings Construction Equipment and the related spare parts.

The equipment include:- Excavators, Backhoe Excavators, Wheel Loaders, Infracore Portable Power & Air compressor,

Bulldozers and Graders, Mixer Trucks, Tower Crane.
